name: Zoodiac Boarbow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ワイルドボウ
name_jp_tl: Wildbow of the Twelve Zodiac Beasts
desc:
5 Level 4 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Zoodiac Boarbow" by using 1 "Zoodiac" monster you control with a different name as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Gains ATK/DEF equal to the ATK/DEF of all "Zoodiac" monsters attached to it as material. This card can attack directly. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent while it has 12 or more materials: You can send as many cards as possible from your opponent's hand and field to the GY, then change this card to Defense Position.

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
